ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., point guard, power forward) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Draft pick number of the player */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to (e.g., Eastern, Western) */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the team's arena */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's head coach */,
  "championships" INTEGER /* Number of championships won by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that played */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the game (e.g., 100-90) */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the game belongs to */,
  "location" TEXT /* Venue where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "pts" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "trb" INTEGER /* Rebounds made by the player */,
  "ast" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player */,
  "stl" INTEGER /* Steals made by the player */,
  "blk" INTEGER /* Blocks made by the player */,
  "min" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player */,
  "fgm" INTEGER /* Field goals made */,
  "fga" INTEGER /* Field goals attempted */,
  "3pm" INTEGER /* Three-pointers made */,
  "3pa" INTEGER /* Three-pointers attempted */,
  "ftm" INTEGER /* Free throws made */,
  "fta" INTEGER /* Free throws attempted */,
  "tov" INTEGER /* Turnovers committed */,
  "pf" INTEGER /* Personal fouls */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award (e.g., MVP, Rookie of the Year) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was given */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "award_voting" (
  "voting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting result */,
  "award_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award the voting result belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the voting result belongs to */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the player in the voting */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes the player received */,
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voter (e.g., coach, analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_award_voting_voter_id FOREIGN KEY ("voter_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_award_voting_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_award_voting_award_id FOREIGN KEY ("award_id") REFERENCES awards ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the season started */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the season started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the season ended */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the championship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_champion_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the coach */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of coaching experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
